  %ge.3 = pred[4,100,1,1]{3,2,1,0} compare(%reshape.174, %ge.2), direction=GE, metadata={op_name="ge"}

  %le.3 = pred[4,100,1,1]{3,2,1,0} compare(%reshape.174, %le.2), direction=LE, metadata={op_name="le"}
